name: codex-review-gate
description: Enforces independent Codex review of design specs, plan documents, and code changes before they land. Blocks ExitPlanMode, Write-to-spec-path (for skills that persist designs directly, e.g. superpowers:brainstorming), Write-to-plan-path (e.g. superpowers:writing-plans), and git commit until the codex:codex-rescue subagent has reviewed the current artifact; uses SHA fingerprints per pending artifact (matched via a [review-target:] marker in the agent prompt) so concurrent blocks cannot clobber each other and any post-review change requires a fresh review.
